title: Record Dependabot setup-ruby update

sources.reason: Dependabot updates the setup-ruby action pin.

riskAssessment.reason: Automated CI action version update with compatibility checks required.

executionDecision.reason: The workflow and supply-chain evidence scope is explicit and CI verifies compatibility.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The dependency update is recorded with an archived Contract and Summary.
The repository quality and compatibility checks pass with the updated action metadata.
The PR remains limited to CI dependency metadata and governance evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The Dependabot PR updates ruby/setup-ruby from 1.316.0 to 1.317.0 and requires an auditable Work Item record for repository PR governance.
constraints: Keep the change limited to the action pin and governance evidence.
Do not weaken any CI or supply-chain gates.
intent.rationale: A small archived Work Item makes automated CI dependency maintenance visible to the same PR governance chain as human-authored changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User confirmed recording Dependabot changes as archived Work Items so the PR gate can pass.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
